title: Junior Business Development Manager at Select CityWalk

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Select CityWalk
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!
